privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.section1Desc: Corterm is a remote terminal client application. We collect the following necessary information to provide our services:
privacy.info1Desc: When you register via third-party login (Apple, GitHub, Google) or phone number/password, we collect your username, email address, and the unique identifier provided by the third party.
privacy.info2Desc: Device identifiers used for activating Workers.
privacy.info3Desc: Metadata of the terminal sessions you create (terminal content is not included).
privacy.section2Desc: Your information is only used for:
privacy.section3Desc: Your data is stored on our secure servers. Real-time terminal session data is transmitted through encrypted channels. We do not store your terminal input and output content.
privacy.section4Desc: We use the following third-party services for authentication, each with their own privacy policies:
privacy.section5Desc: You can delete your account at any time in the app settings. After account deletion, your personal information will be removed from our active database within 30 days. See our

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.section1Desc: Corterm is a secure remote terminal client that allows users to connect to their own remote servers and workstations through encrypted channels.
terms.section2Desc: Using this service requires creating an account. You are responsible for keeping your account credentials secure. You agree not to share or transfer your account without authorization.
terms.section3Desc: You agree not to use this service for any illegal purposes or activities that violate applicable laws and regulations. You are solely responsible for the commands and operations executed through this service.
terms.section4Desc: We strive to maintain continuous service availability but do not guarantee uninterrupted or error-free service. We reserve the right to perform maintenance and updates with prior notice.
terms.section5Desc: You can delete your account at any time through the app settings. For details, please refer to our
terms.section6Desc: This service is provided "as is" without any express or implied warranties. We are not liable for any direct, indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from the use or inability to use this service.
terms.section7Desc: We reserve the right to update these terms at any time. Significant changes will be notified through in-app notifications or email. Continued use of the service constitutes acceptance of the updated terms.

accountDeletion.title: Account Deletion
accountDeletion.step3: Scroll to the bottom and tap "Delete Account"
accountDeletion.step4: Read the confirmation prompt and tap "Delete"
accountDeletion.step5: Tap "Delete" again in the second confirmation
accountDeletion.step6: After deletion, you will be automatically returned to the login page
accountDeletion.warning: Note: This action is irreversible. You will not be able to recover your account after deletion.
accountDeletion.impactDesc: After account deletion, the following data will be processed:
accountDeletion.immediateMarkItem: Your account information will be marked as "deleted" status
accountDeletion.retainedDesc: The following information may be retained for a limited time for security and auditing purposes:
accountDeletion.statusDesc: After deletion, you will not be able to log in with this account. Associated third-party login authorizations (Apple, GitHub, Google) will be revoked. To use the service again, you will need to create a new account.
accountDeletion.helpDesc: If you encounter issues during account deletion, please contact

support.title: Support
support.subtitle: Corterm
support.contactResponse: We will respond within 1-2 business days.
support.faq1A1: 1. Install Corterm Worker on your remote server
support.faq1A2: 2. In the app, tap "Activate Worker" and enter the activation code shown on the terminal
support.faq1A3: 3. After successful activation, you can create terminal sessions and connect
support.faq2A: Worker supports macOS, Linux, and Windows. Mobile app supports iOS and Android.
support.faq3A: Tap the "Delete Account" button at the bottom of the Settings page. See our

landing.heroDesc: Corterm connects your machines to a browser-based terminal. Run a Worker on any machine, access it through the Gateway — from anywhere, on any device.
landing.installHint: One command. Installs the Gateway Worker on your machine.
landing.archDesc: A lightweight Gateway routes your browser to the Worker running on your machine.
landing.featuresDesc: Everything you need to run remote terminals, out of the box.
landing.feat1Desc: Full xterm.js terminal in your browser. Works on desktop, tablet, and mobile.
landing.feat2Desc: Built-in token-based auth. Device flow support for secure machine-to-machine access.
landing.feat3Desc: Bidirectional streaming over WebSockets with MessagePack for minimal latency.
landing.feat4Desc: Run your own Gateway and Workers. No cloud dependency. Your data stays yours.
landing.feat5Desc: Detach and reattach to sessions. Your shell keeps running even if you close the browser.
landing.feat6Desc: Gateway ships as a container image on GHCR. Deploy to any Docker host in seconds.
landing.stepsDesc: From zero to a browser terminal in under a minute.
landing.step1Desc: Run the install command on the machine you want to access.
landing.step2Desc: Pull and run the Gateway container with Docker.
landing.step3Desc: Navigate to the Gateway URL, log in, and your terminal is ready.
landing.ctaDesc: Open source. MIT licensed. Get your terminal in the browser today.
